---
title: "Handzettel: KI in der (Fach-)Hochschullehre"
subtitle: "Folientitel und Speaker Notes"
date: "29 April, 2026"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    geometry:
      - margin=2.5cm
    fontsize: 11pt
    linkcolor: blue
    urlcolor: blue
filters:
  - _handout-filter.lua
bibliography:
  - ../bibliography.bib
  - ../missing-refs.bib
suppress-bibliography: true
---

{{< include index.qmd >}}
